    iterates through all indices in bottom to top order

  • Constructor Details

    • PosInTerm

      public PosInTerm(int[] path)

  • Method Details

    • parseReverseString

      public static PosInTerm parseReverseString(String s)
      create a position from the string The string contains a comma separated list of integers. The position created from the string encapsulated the given list but in reverse order
      Parameters:
      s - the String with the list of integers to be interpreted as term indices in reverse order
      Returns:
      the PosInTerm encapsulating the integer list in reverse order

    • getTopLevel

      public static PosInTerm getTopLevel()
      returns the instance representing the top level position
      Returns:
      the top level position

    • depth

      public int depth()
      the depth of the sub term described by this position
      Returns:
      the term depth

    • isTopLevel

      public boolean isTopLevel()
      true if the position describes the top level position, i.e., the term as a whole
      Returns:
      true iff top level

    • up

      public @Nullable PosInTerm up()
      returns the position of the enclosing term
      Returns:
      the position of the parent

    • firstN

      public PosInTerm firstN(int n)
      returns the position of the depth-n parent term
      Parameters:
      n - the integer specifying the length of the prefix
      Returns:
      the prefix of this position of length n
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if n is greater than the depth of this position

    • down

      public PosInTerm down(int i)
      returns the position for the i-th subterm of the subterm described by this position
      Parameters:
      i - the index of the subterm
      Returns:
      the position of the i-th subterm

    • getIndexAt

      public int getIndexAt(int i)
      returns the index of the subterm at depth i
      Parameters:
      i - the depth of the subterm whose index it to be returned
      Returns:
      an int such that term.subAt(this).sub(getIndex(i)) == term.subAt(firstN(i+1))

    • getIndex

      public int getIndex()
      equivalent to getIndexAt(depth() - 1)
      Returns:
      the index of the subterm described by this position

    • getSubTerm

      public Term getSubTerm(Term t)
      navigate to the subterm described by this position and return it if the described position does not exist in the term an IndexOutOfBoundsException is thrown
      Parameters:
      t - the Term
      Returns:
      the sub term of term t at this position
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if no subterm exists at this position

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • equals

      public boolean equals(@Nullable Object o)
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object

    • integerList

      public String integerList(IntIterator it)
      returns a comma separated list of integers enclosed in brackets (the list contains all integers in the order as returned by the iterator)
      Parameters:
      it - the iterator
      Returns:
      the String with the list of integers

    • iterator

      public IntIterator iterator()
      iterates through all indices in top to bottom order
      Returns:
      iterator through all indices

    • reverseIterator

      public IntIterator reverseIterator()
      iterates through all indices in bottom to top order
      Returns:
      iterator through all indices in reverse order

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • isPrefixOf

      public boolean isPrefixOf(PosInTerm pit)
      Checks whether this pit is the prefix of a given pit.
      Parameters:
      pit - the given pit
      Returns:
      true if this is a prefix of the given pit
